open_prs.title: docs: fix slash command list, module paths and dead link

PR #188: README shrunk from 773→634 lines by removing Highlights v3.1-v3.4 (all content already in CHANGELOG.md).
docs/reference/api.md not fully reviewed — last_synced_with_code_at stays null. Function signatures in api.md not compared with code this run; defer to next run.

Recent feat commits (Phase 5b/5c monitoring, GPG backup encryption, cron-heartbeat watcher) are mentioned in CHANGELOG.md but not yet in CLAUDE.md or README. Both PRs are merged first; follow-up if needed.
